web.title: The Four Seasons Residences - Fort Lauderdale
web.description: Spacious units with open east-west floorplans; Sweeping lake and city views, most with Ocean and Intracoastal; Striking Cuba-Fernandez lobby ...
web.markdown:
- Fort Lauderdale's luxury


condominium on Sunset Lake

- Dock your boat with direct


access to the Intracoastal

- Welcome home

- Watch the sunset every evening

- Private recreational dock


# Explore The Four Seasons

The Iconic Four Seasons Condo in Fort Lauderdale from Real Estate Videos on Vimeo

![video thumbnail](https://i.vimeocdn.com/video/1292090071-b665a61b2372611c5f31c9d31701fa785f91284b98664b59a?mw=80&q=85)

Playing in picture-in-picture

Like

Add to Watch Later

Share

Play

00:00

00:54

Settings

QualityAuto

SpeedNormal

Picture-in-PictureFullscreen

[Watch on Vimeo](https://vimeo.com/642365009?fl=pl&fe=vl)

- Spacious units with open east-west floorplans
- Sweeping lake and city views, most with Ocean and Intracoastal
- Striking Cuba-Fernandez lobby
- Expanded dockage & recreational pier (2018 completion)
- No fixed bridges, direct Intracoastal access
- 45’ heated pool and BBQ area
- Pet-friendly building
- Walking distance to trendy Las Olas and


Ft. Lauderdale Beach

[Read More Amenities](https://fourseasonscondo.org/amenities/ "Amenities")

The Four Seasons on Sunset Lake is a luxury 81 unit pet-friendly condominium in Fort Lauderdale, located off Las Olas Boulevard near the Intracostal Waterway and the Ocean. With its recently updated mid-century design and amenities, The Four Seasons is truly a modern classic.

[Read More About The Four Seasons](http://fourseasonscondo.org/about-the-four-seasons/ "About The Four seasons")

[Take a Tour](https://fourseasonscondo.org/take-a-tour/)

[Available Units](https://www.zillow.com/homes/for_sale/26.118705,-80.114101_ll/globalrelevanceex_sort/26.120169,-80.11226,26.117946,-80.114564_rect/18_zm/)

Located in the heart of Fort Lauderdale, in the exclusive Idlewyld neighborhood, walking distance to trendy Las Olas, the Ocean and Intracostal Waterway. This architect-designed building offers one, two and three bedroom units, all with spacious, open floorplans, high ceilings, and spectacular sunset and water views.

web.markdown:
[SKIP TO MAIN CONTENT](https://www.fourseasons.com/residences/private_residences/fortlauderdale/#main)

[Private Residences](https://www.fourseasons.com/residences/private_residences/)

# Fort Lauderdale

[About the property](https://www.fourseasons.com/residences/private_residences/fortlauderdale/#about_the_property) [Key Amenities](https://www.fourseasons.com/residences/private_residences/fortlauderdale/#key_amenities) [Contact Us](https://www.fourseasons.com/residences/private_residences/fortlauderdale/#contact_us)

Previous slideNext slide

- ![](https://www.fourseasons.com/alt/img-opt/~70.1530.0,0000-0,0000-1600,0000-900,0000/publish/content/dam/fourseasons/images/web/FTL/FTL_070_aspect16x9.jpg)







Elevated Beachfront Living



Set on the spectacular Atlantic coastline of Southern Florida and the vision of an international team of designers, this community of luxury private residences represents a new global destination on Fort Lauderdale Beach.

- ![Modern, white residence kitchen, wood panel under island, large windows with ocean views](https://www.fourseasons.com/alt/img-opt/~70.1530.0,0000-0,0000-6000,0000-3375,0000/publish/content/dam/fourseasons/images/web/FTP/FTP_008_original.jpg)







Designer kitchens



With its custom lacquered millwork cabinetry and antique bronze fittings, fully equipped, open-concept kitchens epitomize the laid-back Fort Lauderdale yachting lifestyle.

- ![](https://www.fourseasons.com/alt/img-opt/~70.1530.0,0000-514,8830-2994,0000-1684,1250/publish/content/dam/fourseasons/images/web/FTP/FTP_010_original.jpg)







Spa-like bathrooms



Set in Italian calacatta capuana, master bathrooms are finished with custom oak and antique brass wall lights, with a Lefroy Brooks soaking tub to unwind and hydrate after a day on the waves.

- ![A man and woman walking between blue lounge chairs and umbrellas on sand towards the ocean.](https://www.fourseasons.com/alt/img-opt/~70.1530.0,0000-312,5000-3000,0000-1687,5000/publish/content/dam/fourseasons/images/web/FTL/FTL_069_original.jpg)







A beachfront affair



An oasis to escape to, right on your doorstep, relax with a spa treatment in a poolside daybed, while Four Seasons Beach Concierge provides elevated service on the golden sands of the Atlantic Ocean.

- ![Rendering of penthouse showing dining area, lounge area and floor-to-ceiling windows with ocean view](https://www.fourseasons.com/alt/img-opt/~70.1530.0,0000-0,2500-3000,0000-1687,5000/publish/content/dam/fourseasons/images/web/FTP/FTP_012_original.jpg)







Inspiring living, inside and out



With expansive, brightly-lit living spaces and open private terraces affording panoramic views of the ocean, these spectacular residences represent the true meaning of indoor-outdoor living.

- ![Aerial view of an outdoor pool surrounded by grey lounge chairs and umbrellas, creating a relaxing atmosphere.](https://www.fourseasons.com/alt/img-opt/~70.1530.0,0000-92,2609-3000,0000-1687,5000/publish/content/dam/fourseasons/images/web/FTL/FTL_067_original.jpg)







A distinctive oceanfront lifestyle



Whether by the pool, on the beach, or in the comfort of your private residence, cutting edge design and world-class amenities provide the perfect backdrop for legendary Four Seasons service.


## About the Property

Private Residences (# of Units)82DeveloperFort PartnersInterior DesignerTara BernerdArchitectKobi KarpOpening Date2022

## Key Amenities

- Fitness Centre designed by Harley Pasternak
- Ocean Sun Deck, a lush private hideaway capturing the style and energy of the South Florida Riviera
- Spa with 6 treatment rooms

Four Seasons Private Residences Fort Lauderdale has sold outTo inquire about opportunities to purchase a private residence at this property, please contact us.

[Contact Us](https://www.fourseasons.com/residences/private_residences/fortlauderdale/contact-us/)

## Contact Us
